shadowseed.build: rustc_edition=2024 rustc_target=wasm32-unknown-unknown rustc_opt=s rustc_crate_type=staticlib clang_target=wasm32 clang_opt=2 output=ray.wasm
shadowseed.world: chunk_w=10 chunk_h=10 grid_size=9 wall_density=5 max_draw_dist=20 max_entities=64 max_particles=128
shadowseed.player: base_hp=100 base_stamina=100 move_speed=0.065 sprint_speed=0.10 walk_drain=0.10 sprint_drain=0.35 stamina_regen=0.30 stamina_regen_per_upgrade=0.08
shadowseed.enemies: stalker_range=7.0 stalker_accel=0.0012 stalker_drag=0.90 stalker_damage=0.11 stalker_hit_radius=0.38 crawler_range=9.0 crawler_accel=0.003 crawler_drag=0.85 crawler_damage=0.07 crawler_hit_radius=0.38 tank_range=5.0 tank_accel=0.0006 tank_drag=0.95 tank_damage=0.20 tank_hit_radius=0.55 tank_scrap=3 ghost_range=8.0 ghost_accel=0.0015 ghost_drag=0.88 ghost_damage=0.11 ghost_hit_radius=0.38 ghost_phase_denom=5 weapon_damage=20.0 weapon_range=6.0 weapon_angle=0.35
shadowseed.loot: base_count=2 depth_bonus=3 hp_heal=15.0 scrap_pickup=3 scrap_to_coins=5 blood_moon_kill_coins=10 normal_kill_coins=5
